nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey-headed greenbul
nodes.summary: Grey-headed greenbul（Phyllastrephus poliocephalus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey-headed greenbul。

nodes.name: Grey-headed greenbul
nodes.summary: The grey-headed greenbul (Phyllastrephus poliocephalus), or grey-headed yellow-bellied greenbul, is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is native to the Western High Plateau. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is becoming rare due to habitat loss. Taxonomy and systematics The grey-headed greenbul was originally described in the genus Xenocichla (a synonym for Bleda). Other alternate names for the grey-headed greenbul include the yellow-bellied bulbul and yellow-bellied greenbul, although these names usually refer to the species of the same names (Alophoixus phaeocephalus and Chlorocichla flaviventris). References

nodes.name: 巴門達高原
nodes.summary: 巴門達高原是非洲中西部國家喀麥隆的高原，受赤道多雨氣候影響，每年平均降雨量1,000至2,000毫米，是薩納加河主要支流的發源地。

nodes.name: Phyllastrephus
nodes.summary: Phyllastrephus（Phyllastrephus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联18种鸟类，如Lowland tiny greenbul、Montane tiny greenbul、White-throated greenbul等18种鸟类。
